title: acer hyrcanum var. intermedium
intro: Acer hyrcanum var. intermedium, also known as the Caucasian maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and has been traditionally used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Acer hyrcanum var. intermedium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
